identity_traits: rounded head shape with prominent forehead
short stubby legs with minimal detail
curled tail tip that forms a small spiral
long flowing blonde hair extending from the head
original_type_traits: purple coloration on head and torso
pointed ears with dark purple tips
cold-weather aesthetic from pale cream and dark purple tones
transformable_parts: head coloration (purple to new type color)
ear shape and color (pointed to new type shape)
tail tip spiral (maintain spiral but change color/texture)
hair texture and color (blonde to new type hair style)
cape color and material (red to new type material)
torso pattern (pale cream to new type pattern)
anchor_phrases: long flowing blonde hair extending from the head
curled tail tip forming a small spiral
short stubby legs with minimal detail

visual_facts.silhouette: The Pokémon has a rounded, somewhat human-like shape with a large head and short limbs.
